summary: Tested new seller analytics features from patch: badges endpoints, notifications endpoints, push registration endpoints. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: performance page shows Seller Badges section (7 badges) and Recent Notifications section; badges page loads correctly on desktop; homepage shows banners with Sponsored labels; login flow works.

issues: Tab switcher (Activity/Performance) only visible on mobile view, not on desktop. Desktop shows activity badges only without tab selector

action_items: Consider adding tab switcher to desktop badges page for consistency with mobile
critical_code_review_comments: sellerAnalyticsApi.ts properly implements all API calls for badges and notifications
BannerSlot.tsx has resolveImageUrl helper for relative URLs - good implementation
Performance page correctly integrates Seller Badges section (0/7) and Recent Notifications section
Badges page has tab switcher in mobile view but desktop view doesn't show tabs - may be intentional design choice
context_for_next_testing_agent: All seller analytics badge and notification APIs are working. Backend tests cover: GET my-badges (with seller_id param), POST mark-viewed, POST evaluate, GET seller notifications (with pagination), PUT mark-as-read, POST/DELETE push token registration. Frontend verified: performance page at /performance/{listing_id} shows badges section and notifications section. Homepage banner with Sponsored label working.

backend_badges_api.GET_my_badges: PASS - Returns badges list with earned_count, total_available, unviewed_count
backend_badges_api.POST_mark_viewed: PASS - Successfully marks badges as viewed

test_verification_results.frontend_homepage: PASS - Loads with listing grid and Sponsored banner
test_verification_results.frontend_performance_page: PASS - Shows Seller Badges (0/7) and Recent Notifications sections
test_verification_results.frontend_badges_page_desktop: PASS - Shows badges with progress (9 in progress)
